emails.subject: Candace
emails.body: Anita, Is Maureen, Gwyn or Mitra in the office tomorrow? Candace Kao woul like to stop by at 9:00 to say Hello and ask if she could help us with any projects. Vince

emails.subject: RE: Candace
emails.body: RE: Candace Mitra and Gwyn are on vacation and will not be back until Jan. 7, 2002. Therese and I have not heard fron Maureen and we don't know her schedule. Regards, Anita DuPont Enron Research Group 713-853-0329 EB 1969

emails.subject: RE: Candace
emails.body: Anita, Can you call Maureen and ask if she plans to come to the office? Vince

emails.subject: RE: Candace
emails.body: Vince, Maureen told us on Thursday that she would be working from home until Jan. 2. Regards, Anita DuPont Enron Research Group 713-853-0329 EB 1969
